title: Kochia villosissima
taxonomy: Kochia villosissima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is an annual herb native to Asia and has also been naturalized in various other regions. The plant is further classified within the genus Kochia and the order Caryophyllales. Its classification is also recognized at the species level, with the full classification being Kochia villosissima. This classification is widely accepted in botanical and horticultural contexts.
